tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check **/*.ts && deno check **/*.tsx
tasks.compile: deno task build && deno task genWin && deno task genLinux && deno task genMac
tasks.genWin: deno compile -A --output secretshare_win.exe --include _fresh --include static --include deno.json main.ts --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
tasks.genLinux: deno compile -A --output secretshare_linux --include deno.json --include _fresh --include static --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu main.ts
tasks.genMac: deno compile -A --output secretshare_osx --include deno.json --include _fresh --include static --target aarch64-apple-darwin main.ts
tasks.compileMac: deno task build && deno task genMac
tasks.compileLinux: deno task build && deno task genLinux
tasks.compileWin: deno task build && deno task genWin
